home.name: Yoquelvis Jorge Abreu
home.description: I build software made for the real world: debuggable code, intentional UX, and production-ready delivery. Direct in approach, serious in execution — no 'it worked on my machine' excuses.

about.title: About Me

cube.title: Rotating stack
cube.hint: Drag the cube to rotate and explore each face

paragraphs: I'm a software developer focused on web products that work in the real world. I care about writing debuggable code, intentional UX, and shipping software that holds up in production — not just Friday's demo.

I work with React, JavaScript, HTML5, and Tailwind on the frontend, and Node.js, Git, and Linux when a project needs full-stack delivery. I'm currently a mid-level web developer at S22 (All Media), building and optimizing web products in production.

My path also includes technology operations at Banco BHD and SQL administration at VICORTIZ, with a solid base in Oracle SQL, Pentaho, and Power BI. When scaling is required, I add Python, Docker, and microservices with the same standard.

jobs.title: Mid Web Developer
jobs.description: I build and optimize production websites using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks. In early 2024 I moved from Dentsu to S22 within the All Media group, keeping the same focus on UX, performance, and reliable delivery.

jobs.title: Web Developer
jobs.description: Started my path within the All Media group, creating and optimizing websites with modern frontend technologies while prioritizing user experience and performance in real environments.

jobs.title: Intern, Technology and Management Systems
jobs.description: During my internship in Technology and Management Systems, I used Oracle SQL to manage enterprise data and created reports and analysis using tools such as Pentaho and BI Publisher, supporting decision making.

jobs.title: SQL Database Administrator
jobs.description: Administration and maintenance of SQL databases. Query optimization and database performance tuning. Management of backups and data recovery. Implementation of security procedures and access control.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.description: A showcase of my most significant and innovative projects

items.title: Velocity Prime
items.description: Formula 1 paddock-style dashboard: live timing, drivers, teams, standings, and race calendar. Dark UI with red accents, clipped-corner cards, and real-time race weekend data.

items.title: Sablee
items.description: Immersive racing team landing page with strong visual identity, section-based navigation (team, competition, merch, sponsors), and a sports-dashboard-style UI.

items.title: AVATARIA 3000
items.description: Unique avatar creator with multiple visual styles, real-time preview, size controls, and direct download from a clean, responsive interface.

items.title: ScheduleHub
items.description: Platform for university students: upload a PDF schedule, process it with AI, and view it in a customizable weekly calendar with PNG, CSV, and JSON export.

items.title: Employee Code Generator
items.description: Desktop PyQt6 app for generating barcodes with unique IDs, SQLite management, role-based authentication, ID card editor with HTML templates, and automatic OCR verification.
